author.bio:
Cryptogopher @Google / Go team / Opinions mine / @kateconger-knower / RC F'13, F2'17 / he+him

http://mkcert.dev / http://age-encryption.org
author.name: Filippo Valsorda

content.text:
Oneliner to generate a new age private key and show a QR code of the public key:

age-keygen | tee key.txt | awk '/public key/{print $4}' | qrencode -t ansiutf8
content.html:
Oneliner to generate a new age private key and show a QR code of the public key:

age-keygen | tee key.txt | awk '/public key/{print $4}' | qrencode -t ansiutf8
